name: agent-arch-system-design
tagline: Architecture-design persona that produces C4/UML diagrams, ADRs, and technology evaluations, read-only over source code.
verdict: Sensible guardrails — write access is scoped to docs/diagrams, source is read-only, major decisions require human approval. Deliverables and decision questions are clearly named. Held back by a boilerplate, trigger-less description, no failure guidance if requirements are unclear or paths are inaccessible, and no re-run/idempotency story for ADR creation.

highlights.summary: description is only 'Agent skill for arch-system-design - invoke with $agent-arch-system-design' — no trigger situations.
No guidance for unclear requirements, inability to access forbidden src/** paths, or missing diagramming tools.
